grokCoder.cmd.login: Grok Coder: Sign in with Grok Account (Direct API)
grokCoder.cmd.logout: Grok Coder: Sign out of Grok Account (Direct API)
grokCoder.cmd.manage: Grok Coder: Manage Account & API Key
grokCoder.cmd.setApiKey: Grok Coder: Set xAI API Key
grokCoder.cmd.clearApiKey: Grok Coder: Clear xAI API Key
grokCoder.participant.description: Code with Grok 4.5: fix, explain, review, live search
grokCoder.slash.fix: Fix problems in the selected code or current file
grokCoder.slash.explain: Explain the selected code or current file
grokCoder.slash.review: Review selected code for bugs, security and performance issues
grokCoder.slash.docs: Generate doc comments for the selected code
grokCoder.slash.search: Live Web/X search (latest versions, breaking changes…)
grokCoder.slash.commit: Generate a commit message from git diff
grokCoder.cfg.model: Model used by the @grok chat participant and commit generation.
grokCoder.cfg.reasoningEffort: Reasoning effort for direct-API calls (low is recommended for coding Q&A).
grokCoder.cfg.enableLiveSearch: Allow /search to use xAI server-side Web/X live search (billed as xAI tools).
grokCoder.cfg.autoSearch: Also attach xAI Web/X search tools to regular @grok chats — the model decides whether to search (billed as xAI tools).
grokCoder.cfg.oauthClientId: Override the default xAI OAuth client ID (rarely needed).
grokCoder.cfg.statusBar: Show the Grok status bar item (current model / reasoning effort).
grokCoder.cfg.additionalModels: Extra models to register in the native Chat model picker, e.g. [{"id":"grok-code-fast-1","name":"Grok Code Fast","contextWindow":256000,"maxOutputTokens":16384}].
